q: Why did you choose that subject/major?
examiner_note:
Đây là câu hỏi về động lực (motivation). 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nói về sở thích cá nhân, triển vọng nghề nghiệp, sức ảnh hưởng từ gia đình hoặc một sự kiện cụ thể đã truyền cảm hứng cho bạn. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cấu trúc như 'It was a combination of...', 'What primarily drew me to...', 'I have always been fascinated by...' để câu trả lời chuyên nghiệp hơn.

band7.text: I chose Graphic Design because I've always loved drawing and being creative since I was a child. Also, I think there are many job opportunities in this field because every company needs a designer to create their visual identity.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, có ý về sở thích và triển vọng việc làm. Ngôn ngữ tự nhiên.

band8.text: What primarily drew me to Environmental Science was my growing concern about climate change and sustainability. I wanted to gain a deeper understanding of how we can protect our planet, and I believe this major provides the perfect platform to do that.
band8.note: Sử dụng cấu trúc nhấn mạnh 'What primarily drew me to...'. Từ vựng tốt ('sustainability', 'platform').

band9.text: My decision to pursue Biomedical Engineering was steered by a profound fascination with how technology can revolutionize healthcare. I've always been keen on problem-solving, and the prospect of developing life-saving medical devices was an opportunity I simply couldn't pass up.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ lôi cuốn ('steered by', 'profound fascination', 'revolutionize'). Sử dụng cụm từ 'keen on', 'prospect of', 'pass up' rất tự nhiên và chính xác.

v.example: The course is primarily intended for beginners.
I was drawn to this university because of its excellent reputation.
His speech had a profound impact on the audience.
I have a lifelong fascination with ancient civilizations.
The internet has revolutionized the way we communicate.
The prospect of a promotion is very exciting.
I couldn't pass up the chance to study abroad.
My personal values align with the company's mission statement.
She is very keen on learning new languages.
My career choices were steered by my passion for social justice.
Success is usually a combination of hard work and luck.
He showed a natural aptitude for music from a young age.
Choosing the right major is the first step on your career path.
I chose this subject purely out of personal interest.
My father was my role model and inspired me to become an engineer.
I followed a family tradition by studying medicine.
Many students choose nursing for the job security it offers.
Finance is a major with high earning potential.
I want a career that allows me to make a positive social impact.
The program provides in-depth knowledge of international law.
Her work is a constant source of inspiration for me.

v.meaning: phương pháp học đi đôi với hành
v.example: This course is perfect for students who prefer a hands-on approach.
You have a natural talent for making people feel at ease.
I chose this major because of its practicality in the current job market.
Studying data science was a strategic choice based on global trends.
I want to be at the forefront of technological innovation.

v.meaning: sự khắt khe trong học thuật
v.example: I was attracted to the academic rigor of the program.
Successful students often have a growth mentality.
The business school has a strong focus on entrepreneurship.
A degree in communication offers great versatility in career choices.
Helping others brings me a great sense of fulfillment.
Studying abroad is part of my long-term goal to work internationally.
The first year of university is a time for self-discovery.
If you follow your passion, you will never work a day in your life.

v.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ
v.example: The course is designed to satisfy the students' intellectual curiosity.

v.meaning: sự thăng tiến trong nghề nghiệp
v.example: Obtaining a master's degree is often necessary for career advancement.
I chose to study Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư because of the high market demand for tech experts.
Majoring in Mandarin was a strategic choice for my future in trade.
My high school teacher had a big influence on my choice of major.
My extracurricular interest in coding eventually became my major.
This major provides a strong foundation for a career in law.
I enjoy studying psychology because I like interacting with people.
Design allows me to express my creativity.
I'm drawn to mathematics because of its clear logic.
Science subjects require a lot of analytical thinking.
The course aims to prepare students for global citizenship.
Participating in student council helps develop leadership skills.
Conferences provide great networking opportunities with industry leaders.
I see my studies as a continuous process of self-improvement.
